'''''Star Wars: Secrets of the Sith''''' is a young readers' guidebook to the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]. The scrapbook features photos along with seventeen pull-out posters.

{{Book-stub}}

==Media==
===Editions===
*{{ISBN|0375810420}}; [[October]] [[2000]]; [[Random House]], Inc.; US paperback<ref name="Amazon" />
